positive: A sophisticated, minimalist abstract geometric portrait of a stylized sloth hanging from lush, bioluminescent jungle vines. The sloth is depicted in a sleek, silhouetted pose, integrating subtle lines of tropical floral patterns into its form. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical. Color palette is deep emerald green, turquoise, royal blue, and ivory gold, utilizing strong contrast and negative space. Style should be highly detailed vector illustration combined with negative space pop art aesthetic. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, designed for apparel print, high resolution, scalable.
